creator: pfeifer@dbai.tuwien.ac.at
text:
Dennis,

would you mind doing another CVSup and checking whether Wine now builds on
your platform?  I have updated the Wine port this week (lots of changes!)
and believe this should be fixed:

  cvsuped the just today (April 16) and wine won't compile here's some of
  the error messages:

     <snip>
     ./parser.y: In function `convert_ctlclass':
     ./parser.y:1885: warning: `cc' might be used uninitialized in this function
     ./parser.y: In function `yyparse':
     ./parser.y:1624: syntax error before `}'
     *** Error code 1

Your feedback is definitely appreciated, thanks!

Gerald
-- 
Gerald "Jerry" pfeifer@dbai.tuwien.ac.at http://www.dbai.tuwien.ac.at/~pfeifer/
